name: Long Tan - Nui Dat Battle Field Full Day Tour
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Long Tan Cross - Nui Dat
highlights: Visit Nui Dat Task Force Base, the former headquarters of the ANZAC forces.
Drive past the Horseshoe and explore the Discourtesy Rubber Plantation with insights into their wartime role.
Pay respects at the Long Tan Battle Cross, honoring the bravery of Australian and Vietnamese soldiers.
Enjoy a local lunch in Ba Ria Town and discover the rustic charm of Vietnam’s countryside.
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
Please provide full name, passport number and nationality when you make a booking.
You need to have a special pass to enter army area. Please send us your scan passport so we can apply speical pass to enter Long Tan area.
Please book this tour at least 48 hours in advance. Any booking made less than 48 hours in advance is not guaranteed.
